title: IndiaMart Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IndiaMart Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
